build-gate.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exit 0; npm run build exit 0 on HEAD with vite-plugin-pwa configured as minify: false and workbox.mode='development'; service worker generated successfully (sw.js + workbox-*.js).

evidence.fix: VitePWA minify: false + workbox: { mode: 'development' } in vite.config.ts to bypass terser renderChunk issues during service worker generation.
